recommendations.title: Lights Out
recommendations.overview: A woman prepares for bed, but realizes that something may be lurking in the shadows.

recommendations.title: Shazam!
recommendations.overview: A boy is given the ability to become an adult superhero in times of need with a single magic word.

recommendations.title: Shazam! Fury of the Gods
recommendations.overview: Billy Batson and his foster siblings, who transform into superheroes by saying "Shazam!", are forced to get back into action and fight the Daughters of Atlas, who they must stop from using a weapon that could destroy the world.

recommendations.title: Lights Out
recommendations.overview: Rebecca must unlock the terror behind her little brother's experiences that once tested her sanity, bringing her face to face with a supernatural spirit attached to their mother.

recommendations.title: Annabelle: Creation
recommendations.overview: Several years after the tragic death of their little girl, a doll maker and his wife welcome a nun and several girls from a shuttered orphanage into their home, soon becoming the target of the doll maker's possessed creation—Annabelle.

recommendations.title: Scream
recommendations.overview: A year after the murder of her mother, a teenage girl is terrorized by a masked killer who targets her and her friends by using scary movies as part of a deadly game.

recommendations.title: The Pool
recommendations.overview: International students at an elite Prague school are stalked and murdered by a masked killer while holding a party in an abandoned water park.

recommendations.title: Weapons
recommendations.overview: When all but one child from the same class mysteriously vanish on the same night at exactly the same time, a community is left questioning who or what is behind their disappearance.

recommendations.title: Perdida
recommendations.overview: A policewoman whose childhood friend disappeared in Patagonia years ago starts a new search to find answers, and soon finds her own life in danger.

recommendations.title: I See You
recommendations.overview: When a 12-year-old boy goes missing at a local park, a detective investigates the case to help the boy's family find answers.
